description: Mirror SS4O envelope fields into the legacy paths the OpenSearch Dashboards explore plugin reads by default. OSD's logs use-case hard-codes DEFAULT_LOGS_COLUMNS_SETTING=['body','severityText','resource.attributes.service.name'] (src/plugins/explore/server/explore_ui_settings.ts), but the OTLP opensearchexporter in ss4o mode writes severity.{text,number} nested and resource.<k> flat — those default columns render empty without this normalization. Tracking issues for the SS4O exporter/UI divergence: opensearch-project/data-prepper#5791, opensearch-project/opensearch-catalog#118, open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib#45428 — all open, no upstream fix. Idempotent (only writes when source field is present and dest is missing).

script.source: if (ctx.severity instanceof Map) { if (ctx.severity.text != null && ctx.severityText == null) { ctx.severityText = ctx.severity.text; } if (ctx.severity.number != null && ctx.severityNumber == null) { ctx.severityNumber = ctx.severity.number; } } if (ctx.resource instanceof Map) { if (ctx.resource.attributes == null) { ctx.resource.attributes = new HashMap(); } for (k in new ArrayList(ctx.resource.keySet())) { if (k == 'attributes') { continue; } if (!ctx.resource.attributes.containsKey(k)) { ctx.resource.attributes.put(k, ctx.resource.get(k)); } } }
